race.comment: SPIV (6) has been safely held in his two runs since coming back from an 11-month spell, the latest effort a modest fourth over this distance at the Kensington track. Fitter now and the blinkers going on is a positive sign from the Joe Pride stable. Expect a much better run. TIME TO DANCE (7) was ridden with more aggression last time out and battled on well for fourth over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Has only raced twice so there is improvement to come. Looks a big threat back in a provincial maiden. KONSA (3) rallied late to knock TIME TO DANCE out of the placings when resuming at the Farm recently. Nicely placed out to 1400m second-up. Will go back from a wide alley but can finish right over the top. DAME DIVIDEND (8) solid effort last start, beaten a long neck into second over 1300m at Scone. Back from a 40-day let-up and has the benefit of a trial placing, place chance.
